feedback.text: I think it would be in this Act's spirit to also include some regulations on payment processsors, to prevent them from debanking when the reason to do so is not to avoid illegal purchases. In the last few years, payment processsors have increasingly been threating, and sometimes actually proceeded, with debanking online stores that sell nothing illegal. Aside from the fact that this practice allows far too much control on the market, and that it's a form of censorship, in the end its the consumers who lose something they have demand for, for no good reason.
